proposals.title: UP_TRI × Bear: n=96, 94.7% WR, Tier M → boost candidate (TAKE_SMALL)

claim.what: Promote boost_pattern: signal=UP_TRI, regime=Bear (Tier B / TAKE_SMALL)
claim.expected_effect: Surface as Tier-B boost on cohort matches; observed +32.0pp edge over per-signal baseline

evidence: Wilson 95% lower bound 0.8815 well above Tier M floor — sample size adequate
R-multiple 0.61 below Tier S threshold (1.0); promotion is to Tier M (B/TAKE_SMALL) only, not Tier S (A/TAKE_FULL)
risks: Cohort tier may drift on next archive comparison; demotion auto-fires per §3
R-multiple distribution under D-8 review (Day-6 forced-exit dominance per project_anchor §7 D-8)
approval would propagate overlap to mini_scanner_rules.json

proposed_rule_entry.reason: brain_step4: cohort Tier M, n=96, wr=94.7%, edge +32.0pp

decision_metadata.llm_enrichment_rationale: Step 4 tier classification remains robust (n=96, Wilson lower 0.8815, +32.0pp edge over UP_TRI baseline) with promotion correctly capped at Tier M/TAKE_SMALL given R-multiple 0.61. Cohort is regime-gated to Bear while current regime is Choppy (stable, 7 days) with only 11 of 80 Bear exposures, so activation is deferred and the existing Choppy concentration (86.25%) is not immediately compounded. Consistent with continuous prior approvals of this exact cohort (2026-04-29 through 2026-05-16) with no trader rejection on record.

proposals.title: UP_TRI × Metal: n=17, 88.2% WR, Tier M → boost candidate (TAKE_SMALL)

claim.what: Promote boost_pattern: signal=UP_TRI, sector=Metal (Tier B / TAKE_SMALL)
claim.expected_effect: Surface as Tier-B boost on cohort matches; observed +25.5pp edge over per-signal baseline

evidence: Wilson 95% lower bound 0.6566 well above Tier M floor — sample size adequate
R-multiple 0.72 below Tier S threshold (1.0); promotion is to Tier M (B/TAKE_SMALL) only, not Tier S (A/TAKE_FULL)
risks: Cohort tier may drift on next archive comparison; demotion auto-fires per §3
R-multiple distribution under D-8 review (Day-6 forced-exit dominance per project_anchor §7 D-8)
UP_TRI concentration at 70% of open book (56/80); Metal-filtered promotion is narrower than broad UP_TRI but still feeds the same dominant signal_type
R-multiple 0.72 driven partly by Day-6 forced-exit dominance (D-8 review pending) — actual edge in R terms may be overstated
approval would propagate overlap to mini_scanner_rules.json

proposed_rule_entry.reason: brain_step4: cohort Tier M, n=17, wr=88.2%, edge +25.5pp

decision_metadata.llm_enrichment_rationale: Step 4 tier classification remains robust (n=17, Wilson lower 0.6566 above Tier M floor, +25.5pp edge over UP_TRI baseline) with promotion correctly capped at Tier M/TAKE_SMALL given R-multiple 0.72. The sector=Metal filter narrows rather than amplifies the existing UP_TRI exposure (56 of 80 open) in an 86.25% Choppy-concentrated portfolio, and TAKE_SMALL sizing limits incremental concentration. Consistent with continuous prior approvals of this exact cohort (2026-04-29 through 2026-05-16) with no trader rejection on record.

proposals.title: Exposure concentration: by_regime = Choppy (86.2%)

claim.what: Concentration risk: by_regime = Choppy; recommended action: Pause new entries in regime=Choppy until either (a) regime mix rebalances below 80% via natural Day-6 exits, or (b) Choppy×UP_TRI cohort promotes from Candidate to Tier M to justify the exposure
claim.expected_effect: Trader awareness of tail risk: A Choppy→Bull or Choppy→Bear regime flip would simultaneously invalidate the trigger context for 69 of 80 open positions (mostly UP_TRI longs), forcing correlated unwind across 12+ sectors with no statistical edge support to absorb the shock

evidence: regime_concentration.triggered=true at observed=0.8625 vs threshold=0.80 (Choppy dominant, 69/80 positions)
Matched Choppy×UP_TRI cohort is only Candidate tier (n=107) — unvalidated edge
UP_TRI signal share 56/80 = 70% reinforces directional skew within the unvalidated regime
UP_TRI×Choppy×Bank cell at 0.10 share is below 0.20 cell threshold but represents the largest single bucket
risks: Recommendation may be over-cautious; concentration may be edge-validated
Trader may already be aware; informational only

proposals.reversibility: Informational warning; no system mutation. Suppresses on next run if concentration drops below threshold.

decision_metadata.recommended_action: Pause new entries in regime=Choppy until either (a) regime mix rebalances below 80% via natural Day-6 exits, or (b) Choppy×UP_TRI cohort promotes from Candidate to Tier M to justify the exposure
decision_metadata.tail_risk_scenario: A Choppy→Bull or Choppy→Bear regime flip would simultaneously invalidate the trigger context for 69 of 80 open positions (mostly UP_TRI longs), forcing correlated unwind across 12+ sectors with no statistical edge support to absorb the shock
decision_metadata.llm_rationale: Regime concentration is triggered at 0.8625 (Choppy, above the 0.80 threshold) and the matched Choppy×UP_TRI cohort sits only at Candidate tier (n=107) — unvalidated edge. UP_TRI dominates signal mix at 56/80 = 70% (below 85%) and the only flagged cell (UP_TRI×Choppy×Bank) sits exactly at the 0.10 share, well below the 0.20 cell threshold. The regime concentration alone with unvalidated cohort support warrants warn — a Choppy→Bull or Choppy→Bear flip would unwind the 80-position book simultaneously with no statistical justification.
